Package org.eventb.ui.prover

Interface ITacticApplication

IPositionApplication, IPredicateApplication

FunSingletonImg.FunSingletonImgApplication, He.HeAppliction, ImpAnd.ImpAndApplication, ImpCaseProvider.ImpCaseProviderApplication, ImplicationElimination1.ImplicationElemination1Application, PPTacticProvider.PPTacticProviderApplication, PPTacticProviderRestricted.PPTacticProviderRestrictedApplication, PPTacticProviderWithLasso.PPTacticProviderWithLassoApplication, RanComp.RanCompApplication, RanDistLeft.RanDistLeftApplication, RanDistRight.RanDistRightApplication, RelImgUnionLeft.RelImgUnionLeftApplication, RelImgUnionRight.RelImgUnionRightApplication, RelOvr.RelOvrApplication, RemoveInclusion.RemoveInclusionApplication, RemoveInclusionUniversal.RemoveInclusionUniversalApplication, RemoveMembership.RemoveMembershipApplication, RemoveNegation.RemoveNegationApplication, RemoveStrictInclusion.RemoveStrictInclusionApplication, SetEql.SetEqlApplication, SetMinus.SetMinusApplication, UnionInterDist.UnionInterDistApplication
public interface ITacticApplication
Common protocol for providing tactic applications.

Implementors of this interface should also implement one of the sub-interfaces ( IPositionApplication, IPredicateApplication ), so that the way they are applied can be determined.

Since:
1.1

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ITactic
    getTactic(String[] inputs, String globalInput)
    Returns the tactic to be applied.
    String
    getTacticID()
    Returns the ID of this tactic.

  • Method Details

    • getTactic

      ITactic getTactic(String[] inputs, String globalInput)
      Returns the tactic to be applied.
      Parameters:
      inputs - an array of Strings the user can type in for quantified predicates
      globalInput - a String taken from the input area in the Proof Control View
      Returns:
      a tactic to apply

    • getTacticID

      String getTacticID()
      Returns the ID of this tactic.

      Must be the same as the one provided in the 'proofTactics' extension point.

      Returns:
      the ID String of this tactic
